HumanNotification.name: notify_start
HumanNotification.title: Demo Starting
HumanNotification.message: Human interaction demo is beginning. You will be asked to confirm, provide input, and complete a task.

HumanWarning.name: warn_example
HumanWarning.title: Workspace Active
HumanWarning.message: Robot will be moving in the workspace. Stay clear of the work area.

HumanConfirm.name: confirm_proceed
HumanConfirm.title: Ready to Proceed?
HumanConfirm.message: The robot will begin a pick operation. Is the workspace clear and safe?

HumanNotification.name: notify_confirmed
HumanNotification.title: Confirmed
HumanNotification.message: Operator confirmed workspace is clear. Proceeding.

HumanInput.name: select_target
HumanInput.title: Select Target Location
HumanInput.message: Where should the robot place the object?

HumanNotification.name: notify_selection
HumanNotification.title: Target Selected
HumanNotification.message: Operator selected a target station. Proceeding to pick.

HumanTask.name: inspect_placement
HumanTask.title: Inspect Placement
HumanTask.message: Please visually inspect the placement area and confirm the object is correctly positioned. Press Done when verified or Failed if repositioning is needed.

HumanWarning.name: warn_inspection_failed
HumanWarning.title: Inspection Failed
HumanWarning.message: Operator reported placement issue. Manual intervention may be needed.

HumanConfirm.name: confirm_continue_anyway
HumanConfirm.title: Continue Anyway?
HumanConfirm.message: The inspection failed. Do you want to continue the demo, or reject to abort?

HumanNotification.name: notify_complete
HumanNotification.title: Demo Complete
HumanNotification.message: All human interaction nodes exercised successfully.
